items.title_en: Marco Rubio says U.S. expects Iran response on peace deal 'today'

items.desc_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥周五表示，美国期待伊朗对华盛顿结束战争的提议做出回应。

items.title_en: States crack down on tax break for wealthy investors

items.title_en: Anti-war protests rock Japan as PM pushes for stronger defence

items.desc_zh: 日本数十年来最大规模的反战抗议活动突显了民众对其和平宪法修改的分歧。

items.title_en: Redistricting race to the bottom ramps up, as GOP eyes more states to draw new House maps

items.desc_en: An April Supreme Court ruling has caused a scrambled in some southern states to redistrict before November's midterm elections.
items.desc_zh: 最高法院四月份的一项裁决导致南部一些州在 11 月中期选举之前争先恐后地重新划分选区。

items.title_en: Trump gives 4 July ultimatum to EU to approve trade deal with US
items.title_zh: 特朗普于 7 月 4 日向欧盟发出最后通牒，要求批准与美国的贸易协议
items.desc_en: The US president said the European Union must enact the trade deal agreed last year and drop tariffs on American goods to zero.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，欧盟必须实施去年达成的贸易协议，并将美国商品的关税降至零。
